series_description: Record of approved Orthotist, Prosthetist, Posthetist-Orthotist, and Pedorthist licenses, including Temporary licenses, LO, LP, LPO, LPED, issued pursuant to ORC Section 4779.09.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain four years after being moved to inactive status or one year after death.

series_description: This series contains license renewal applications, which may contain licensee''s name, SS#, license number, address, signature and statements regarding supervision or continuing education compliance. All license types issued by agency pursuant to ORC Section 4779.09, Orthotist, Prosthetist, Prosthetist-Orthotist, Pedorthist, including Temporary licenses.
Used to deposit and record revenue receipts from any known revenue source.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved

series_description: Continuing education forms show the basis of continuing education credits for maintaining license. May also include certificates of completion, correspondence, tracking forms or transcripts. All license types issued by agency pursuant to ORC Section 4779.09, including Orthotist, Prosthetist, Prosthetist-Orthotist, and Pedorthist.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for five years from submission approval.

series_description: These are applications that were denied by the board for not meeting the minimal qualifications or failed to provide all the documentation required for licensure.
These reports contain applicants'' social security numbers and the results of any criminal record checks associated with the applicant. Per
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for 90 days after receipt letter is sent to applicant informing them of their right to a copy of the report

series_description: The files may include renewal materials, statements regarding supervision and continuing education compliance. File may contain licensee’s name, SS#, license number, address or signature.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain four years from the time the license becomes lapsed
